description: A new customer needs to be set up in the system, including their legal entity, billing/shipping addresses, and credit limit.

nodes.task_description: Create a new customer account with their legal name and tax ID.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the main customer record.

nodes.task_description: Add the customer's billing and primary shipping addresses.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent adds two distinct addresses to the customer record.

nodes.task_description: Submit the new account for a credit check and set the approved credit limit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent runs the credit check, receives an approved limit of $50,000, and updates the customer's financial profile.
